ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "iso_numeric_code" INTEGER /* ISO numeric code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion within the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's capital city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's capital city */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) spoken in the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi_data" (
  "hdi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HDI data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the HDI data */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* HDI rank of the country */,
  "rank_change" TEXT /* Change in HDI rank compared to the previous year */,
  "hdi_value" REAL /* HDI value of the country */,
  "hdi_change" REAL /* Change in HDI value compared to the previous year */,
  "hdi_category" TEXT /* HDI category (e.g., Very High, High, Medium, Low) */,
  "hdi_source" TEXT /* Source of the HDI data (e.g., World Bank, United Nations) */,
  "hdi_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the HDI value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hdi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_data_hdi_category FOREIGN KEY ("hdi_category") REFERENCES hdi_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Annual birth rate */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Annual death rate */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in rural areas */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economics" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) in billions of USD */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in USD */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Annual inflation rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Annual unemployment rate */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "human_poverty_index" REAL /* Human Poverty Index (HPI) */,
  "gdp_per_capita_ppp" REAL /* GDP per capita in purchasing power parity (PPP) terms */,
  "inflation_rate_average" REAL /* Average annual inflation rate over the past five years */,
  "unemployment_rate_youth" REAL /* Unemployment rate among youth (ages 15-24) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social indicator data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the social indicator data */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth in years */,
  "life_expectancy_male" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth for males */,
  "life_expectancy_female" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth for females */,
  "mean_years_of_schooling" REAL /* Mean years of schooling for the adult population */,
  "expected_years_of_schooling" REAL /* Expected years of schooling for children entering the education system */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Adult literacy rate */,
  "literacy_rate_male" REAL /* Adult literacy rate for males */,
  "literacy_rate_female" REAL /* Adult literacy rate for females */,
  "internet_usage_rate" REAL /* Internet usage rate */,
  "gender_inequality_index" REAL /* Gender Inequality Index (GII) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the education data */,
  "primary_enrollment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of primary school enrollment */,
  "secondary_enrollment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of secondary school enrollment */,
  "tertiary_enrollment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of tertiary school enrollment */,
  "public_expenditure_on_education" REAL /* Public expenditure on education as a percentage of GDP */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" REAL /* Average teacher-student ratio */,
  "education_expenditure" REAL /* Public expenditure on education as a percentage of GDP */,
  "pupil_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Average number of pupils per teacher in primary and secondary schools */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the health data */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Public expenditure on health as a percentage of GDP */,
  "health_expenditure_private" REAL /* Private expenditure on health as a percentage of GDP */,
  "physicians_per_thousand" REAL /* Number of physicians per 1,000 population */,
  "hospital_beds_per_thousand" REAL /* Number of hospital beds per 1,000 population */,
  "hospital_beds_per_capita" REAL /* Number of hospital beds per capita */,
  "immunization_coverage_dtp3" REAL /* Percentage of children aged 12-23 months receiving three doses of DTP3 vaccine */,
  "mortality_rate_under_five" REAL /* Under-five mortality rate per 1,000 live births */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the environmental data */,
  "carbon_dioxide_emissions" REAL /* Total carbon dioxide emissions in million metric tons */,
  "renewable_energy_share" REAL /* Share of renewable energy in total energy consumption */,
  "forest_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of land area covered by forests */,
  "water_stress_index" REAL /* Water stress index (0-100) */,
  "air_pollution_index" REAL /* Air pollution index (0-100) */,
  "renewable_energy_target" REAL /* Country's target for renewable energy consumption */,
  "carbon_emissions_per_capita" REAL /* Carbon dioxide emissions per capita */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "hdi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HDI data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the HDI data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the HDI data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hdi_id FOREIGN KEY ("hdi_id") REFERENCES hdi_data ("hdi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HDI category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the HDI category */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the HDI value for the category */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the HDI value for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the validation rule (e.g., range check, consistency check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the data quality issue (e.g., inconsistency, missing value) */,
  "issue_status" TEXT /* Status of the data quality issue (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the user group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the user group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the access control rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the access control rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the access control rule (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)
